name: Scalloped Potato and Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Onions, peeled and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water for 10 minutes, then drain.
2. In a double boiler over direct heat, melt butter. Stir in flour, mustard, salt, and pepper.
3. Gradually add milk to the mixture, stirring until smooth and thickened.
4. Arrange the sliced potatoes, tuna, and onions in alternate layers in a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Pour the sauce over all.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Makes 6 servings. For a richer dish, use two cans of tuna or substitute a can of salmon for the tuna.
